name: iopn-sovereign-dapp-framework
description: Universal, production-grade dApp framework for IOPn Chain. Build sovereign dApps with verifiable credentials, governance, reputation systems, and IOPn ecosystem integration.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd smart-contracts && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:frontend
scripts.audit: cd smart-contracts && npm run audit || true
scripts.lint: cd smart-contracts && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint || true

author: IOPn Community
